living near the capital. Even the native Dh.
will be benefitted by this combination. Mars Moon
Saturn is conjunct Mercury in Jupiter's house. Pisces and Ketu is in
Aries the next house aspected by the Moon in the 7th to Ketu. The native
will, therefore, be learned in the Mantra Vidya, particularly propitiating
female deities (Devi Upasana). Ketu in the house of Mars is an impediment
for Saturn; but it is all overcome by the conjunction of Mercury with Saturn.
As Jupiter is conjunct the Sun, the native Will be employed in a
Government concern. With Mercury in the second to the Sun and Ketu in
third, the native will become a Vedic scholar well versed in all branches of
the subject. Until Saturn completes his transit of Sagittarius things da not
appear to be harmonic (Mars in Sagittarius is an enemy, of Saturn), so after
